bug_report.summary: File menu: left-gutter/icon area rendering changes for disabled items (Save/Close)
steps_to_reproduce: Launch JabRef (no library opened, so Save/Close are disabled).
expected_behaviors: Disabled menu items (e.g., Save library/Save as/Close library) keep consistent left-gutter/icon/indicator rendering compared to previous behavior.
actual_behaviors: The left-gutter/icon/indicator area for multiple disabled items changes (small blocks/markers appear/move near the left edge of the File menu entries), indicating a rendering/alignment regression in the menu.

bug_report.summary: Exported preferences XML shows reordered `xmpPrivacyFilters` value after change (non-deterministic/stability regression)
steps_to_reproduce: Export preferences to an XML file (File â†’ Export â†’ Preferences / Export preferences).
Open the exported XML and locate the `xmpPrivacyFilters` entry (search for `xmpPrivacyFilters`).
Compare the exported value ordering (semicolon-separated list) across builds (before vs after change).
expected_behaviors: Exported preferences should be stable/deterministic across runs/builds when the underlying preference value has not changed.
If ordering is normalized, it should be consistent (e.g., preserved insertion order or a defined sort order) across builds.
actual_behaviors: The `xmpPrivacyFilters` value is exported with a different order of items after the change (e.g., before: `pdf;keywords;note;review`, after: `review;keywords;note;pdf`).
